rationale: The only resume change was relocating every employer to the United States, which carries no job-relevant information. Both evaluations award an identical 3/10 and rest on the same substantive reasoning: ~13-14 years experience below the 15+ Principal/Director bar, no recognized AI/ML expertise or shipped AI platforms, no advanced degree, and MCP work at re:cinq being too nascent. The wording differs but no concern, score, or reasoning keys off the location change.
